message:
test(proptest): add 12 property tests for RevocationRegistry types

Extends proptest_policy_approval.rs with serde roundtrips for
RevocationRecord and RevocationRegistrySnapshot plus behavioral tests:
unique ID generation, revoke→is_revoked detection, reinstate clears
revocation, nonexistent reinstate returns false, active_count tracking,
eviction bounds, snapshot state reflection, active_revocation lookup.

Total: 32 property tests (20 approval + 12 revocation).
Clippy clean, test execution pending system load reduction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
